Trainer biography

Home Trainer Details

Shahid

Personal Trainer
Experience: 16 Years
Phone: 0302-2252258
Location: 6th Avenue Commercial Plaza LDA Avenue 01 2nd Floor

About Me

Shahid is an experienced personal trainer focused on helping clients build strength, confidence, and long-term healthy habits. With 16 years of experience, he creates practical and personalized workout plans for fat loss, muscle gain, improved endurance, and overall fitness. Shahid believes in consistent coaching, smart training, and a motivating environment that helps every client stay committed. His goal is to guide each member toward real progress while creating a supportive fitness journey inside and outside the gym.

Trainer Skills

  • Strength Training 100%
  • Body Transformation 90%
  • Functional Fitness 70%
